case_title: ARMAND DUBAIR FRAZIER VS. LISE-GABRIELLE GUTELIUS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT, NOT SERVED. CO-DEFENDANT HERTZ PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FRAZIER, ARMAND DUBAIR AS TO DEFENDANT GUTELIUS, LISE-GABRIELLE THE HERTZ CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LISE-GABRIELLE GUTELIUS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-13-2010 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAZIER, ARMAND DUBAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,685.00, DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $800.00 ACCUPUNTURE BILLS AND $800.00 IN PAIN AND SUFFERING FOR A TOTAL OF $1600.00. DEFENDANT LISE-GABRIELLE GUTELIUS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAZIER, ARMAND DUBAIR AS TO DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-02-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES FILED BY FRAZIER, ARMAND DUBAIR THE HERTZ CORPORATION
